cot_prefix: Okay, I'm trying to figure out how a typical person would answer this question about causation. The scenario involves a bear, a hedgehog, and a polar bear with a box of colored pencils. The question is whether the hedgehog caused the polar bear's problem of not being able to finish his homework because there were no pencils left. Let me first break down the scenario: 1. A bear and a hedgehog were shown a box of colored pencils. 2. Only bears were allowed to take pencils; hedgehogs were not. 3. The hedgehog was absent
